docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. CASES CSM-841719 AND CSM-841720 ARE RELATED CASES. BOTH CASES HEARD TOGETHER DURING THE 1:30 CALENDAR. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT(S). CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE 122.55. SERVED SEP-05-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MATIASIC, GINO DBA GMM CONSTRUCTION CO.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY VIDAS, BORIS DBA  BV ELECTRIC AS TO DEFENDANT MATIASIC, GINO DBA GMM CONSTRUCTION CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIDAS, BORIS DBA  BV ELECTRIC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MATIASIC, GINO DBA GMM CONSTRUCTION CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
